name: ethernetErrorPacket
title: ethernetErrorPacket
description: Can be use in on ethernetErrorPacket handler to access packet data.

parameters.name: packet var
parameters.description: Character string defining the object’s variable name.

row: time_ns Point in time, units: nanoseconds
hwChannel Hardware channel. If not supported by network interface, value is 1.
Only with Vector Interfaces, i.e. VN5640, with operation mode with more than 1 hardware channel.
